title: LifeSmart Nature Thermostat (Gray Frame - Black Glass) LS220-GT1
description:
LifeSmart’s Nature Thermostat has three fan speed interfaces and two valve interfaces for HVAC or floor heating system
control and management. It is suitable for household, commercial and industrial scenarios. It controls the fan coil and electric valve, electric ball valve or air valve at the end of the HVAC or floor heating system.
Adapter: AC 100-240V | Packaging: English | EAN: Upper cover:  6932046203777
bottom cover: 6932046203487 | HS code: 8471412000
availability: Catalogue information under review / availability under review
